creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 182938
Updated patch to update devel/bazel to 0.5.0

Update devel/bazel to 0.5.0

Release notes: https://github.com/bazelbuild/bazel/releases/tag/0.5.0

While there, also set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH for the build, unless set already, to the timestamp in distinfo, to obtain a reproducible binary with a meaningful timestamp.
